title: ISic003034. Text engraved on wall of a rock-cut tomb
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/UQRFDXEG
1Θόας
2[---]ΧΙ[---]

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/UQRFDXEG
1ΘΟΑΣ
2[---]ΧΙ[---]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text of Manganaro

translation

commentary

Whether the text should be understood to belong to the original tomb is unclear. The name Thoas is not attested in Sicily. A second text is incised on one of the adjoining walls (ISic003035).

bibliography

  • 42.0873.1 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • Manganaro 1992 487-492 no.VI fig. 26-27 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001830

Large letters of Hellenistic type: broken bar alpha, round theta and omicron of equal size, theta with central dot.

Line 1 190 Interlineation line 1 to 2
